device_name: HERA W10 Diagnostic Ultrasound System; HERA W9 Diagnostic Ultrasound System
intended_use: The Diagnostic Ultrasound System and transducers are intended for diagnostic ultrasound imaging and fluid analysis of the human body. The clinical applications include: Fetal/Obstetrics, Abdominal, Gy
intended_use_full: The Diagnostic Ultrasound System and transducers are intended for diagnostic ultrasound imaging and fluid analysis of the human body. The clinical applications include: Fetal/Obstetrics, Abdominal, Gynecology, Pediatric, Small Organ, Neonatal Cephalic, Adult Cephalic, Trans-rectal, Trans-vaginal, Muscular-Skeletal (Conventional, Superficial), Urology, Cardiac Adult, Cardiac Pediatric and Peripheral vessel.
target_condition: Fetal cardiac assessment and fetal biometry measurement
ground_truth: Manual annotation by three expert reviewers (obstetricians with >20 years experience and sonographers with >10 years experience in fetal cardiology), supervised by an obstetrician with >25 years experience.
other_metrics: HeartAssist segmentation dice-score 0.88; HeartAssist area measurement error ≤8%; HeartAssist angle measurement error ≤4%; HeartAssist circumference measurement error ≤11%; HeartAssist diameter measurement error ≤11%. BiometryAssist segmentation dice-score 0.91; BiometryAssist circumference measurement error ≤8%; BiometryAssist distance measurement error ≤4%; BiometryAssist NT/NB/IT measurement error ≤1mm. ViewAssist segmentation dice-score 0.89.
